name: CANopenUploadGetData
title: CANopenUploadGetData
syntax: void CANopenUploadGetData( char[] buffer, dword bufferSize, dword errCode[] ); //form 1
void CANopenUploadGetData( byte[] buffer, dword bufferSize, dword errCode[] ); //form 2
description: Returns the data of a CANopen upload in a callback function as char or byte array.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Char (form 1) or byte (form 2) array buffer for the data.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in bytes.

parameters.name: errCode
parameters.description: Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field). 0: Value was retrieved 1: Value not available

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
